prompt_snapshot:
16:9 horizontal Chinese blog body illustration, 2560x1440.
Use the provided chibi Avilia reference as the character identity anchor: red hair, black outfit, small cross motif.

Scene: a small younger Avilia sits indoors at a computer desk, quietly building a tiny safe world out of keyboard keys and simple code blocks. Outside the window, distant blurred children play, but they are not drawn harshly. A tiny dark seed labeled "内向" sits in a flowerpot beside the desk.

Core meaning: a small childhood moment planted introversion, and computers became a safe place.

Style: gentle Chinese blog illustration, white space, soft black lines, dark red accents, no harsh bullying scene. Minimal labels: "内向的种子", "电脑里的小世界".

Avoid depicting mockery directly, avoid gloomy horror tone, avoid too much text.
